title: Safari
writer: Delmer Daves, Paul Hervey Fox, Harry Hervey
actors: Douglas Fairbanks Jr., Madeleine Carroll, Tullio Carminati
plot: Millionaire Baron de Courland and his fiancée Linda Stewart employ Jim Logan as a guide for their hunting trip in the jungle. Linda finds unplanned adventure in her sudden love for Jim, ultimately forsaking her future with the Bar...
